model_comparison: Model 1 is the clear winner across both dimensions due to its appropriate control of prosody. By significantly slowing down the speech rate (approx. 20s total), Model 1 successfully simulates the lethargy and heaviness associated with 'fatigue' and a 'thick' voice quality.
